data.body: Claim integration: transition._plan_review_precheck wired into claim_compute (OUTSIDE the lock; fail-open unreadable config; bugs/session_logs exempt) + claim --force=<reason> (audit-logged). config verify.require_plan_review_for_claim (default OFF; threaded via rebar.claim(force=)). Claim path makes NO LLM/network call (pure local HMAC verify) — interface-tested. Fail-CLOSED when enabled + signing unavailable. Reuses the atomic claim primitive. verify-completion: PASS.
